name: Lendio
what_it_does: Lendio operates a small business loan marketplace API that matches borrowers to 75+ lenders, enabling embedded financing applications for SBA loans, lines of credit, equipment financing, and other small business loan products.
use_cases: Embedding small business loan application flows into accounting, banking, or fintech platforms
Automated loan matching: submit business profile and receive multiple lender offers
SBA loan application facilitation through Lendio's lender network
Working capital and equipment financing origination for SMB platforms
Referring business customers to financing options within a B2B SaaS product
not_for: Consumer (personal) loans — Lendio is strictly small business financing
Direct lender integrations — Lendio is a marketplace, not a direct lender
Real-time credit decisioning — Lendio matches then routes to lenders who make their own decisions
Large enterprise or commercial real estate loans — Lendio focuses on SMB under ~$5M
best_when: A platform serving small businesses (accounting software, payroll, banking) wants to offer embedded financing as a feature without building lender relationships directly — Lendio handles the lender network.
avoid_when: You need direct lending API access, real-time automated decisioning, or are serving enterprise borrowers — Lendio's marketplace model involves human loan brokers and is not fully automatable.

auth.notes: API key authentication for partner integrations. OAuth 2.0 available for embedded flows. Partner API access requires a formal referral/embed partner agreement with Lendio — not self-service.

pricing.notes: Revenue share model — Lendio pays partners a referral fee for funded loans rather than charging API access fees. Partner agreement required. No published API pricing.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API error documentation is sparse. Error responses are basic JSON with HTTP status codes and limited detail. Loan status transitions are not well-documented for programmatic handling.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No documented idempotency support. Application submissions should be deduplicated using business EIN or application reference ID at the application layer.
known_agent_gotchas: Lendio is a marketplace — loan decisioning happens at individual lenders, not via API; agents cannot automate the full approval cycle
Partner API access requires a signed referral agreement and is not available for anonymous developers
Loan application status updates can take days as they depend on lender response times, not just Lendio systems
FCRA obligations apply to any system that accesses or stores borrower credit-related data
Webhook delivery reliability is not well-documented — implement polling fallback for status checks
Revenue share payouts are manual reconciliation processes, not API-driven
API documentation is primarily available post-partner-agreement and not fully public

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GLBA and FCRA compliance required for borrower data handling. API key authentication is simple but lacks scope granularity. No published security certifications found. Partner-level access controls limit exposure.
